titleEn: Yamaha Agriculture adds herbicide spraying to Prospr robot
titleZh: 雅马哈农业为Prospr机器人新增除草剂喷洒功能
summaryZh: 雅马哈农业与Croplands Equipment合作，为其Prospr自主混合动力平台开发了除草剂喷洒附件，实现果园和葡萄园的自动化杂草控制。该附件采用模块化设计，支持自动喷嘴激活、药箱搅拌、液位监测及基于车速的实时喷雾速率调节，并配备机械式防撞吊臂。通过多车远程界面，一名或两名操作员可同时监控多台Prospr车辆。该平台搭载柴电混合动力系统，续航达40小时，油耗比传统方案降低70%。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了模块化自主机器人在果园/葡萄园精准植保中的最新应用，结合AI与混合动力技术，对智慧种植领域的自动化升级具有直接参考价值。
contentFull: Yamaha Agriculture adds herbicide spraying to Prospr robot 03-06 | Autonomous/semi-autosteering systems | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintThe new attachment, developed with Croplands Equipment, brings weed control to the autonomous vehicle already working in vineyards and orchards across the US, Australia and New Zealand. Photos: Yamaha AgricultureYamaha Agriculture has introduced a herbicide spraying attachment for its Prospr autonomous hybrid vehicle platform, broadening the machine’s capabilities to include automated weed control in orchards and vineyards.The attachment was developed in partnership with Croplands Equipment and is designed to slot into Prospr’s existing modular architecture, allowing growers to switch between tools without significant downtime. It made its public debut at Hort Connections 2026 in South Australia.Automated nozzle activation and tank agitationWeed management has long been a labour-intensive task with tight timing requirements – delays can directly affect crop quality and yield. The new attachment aims to address that pressure through a system that automates nozzle activation, tank agitation, liquid level monitoring, and spray rate adjustments in real time based on vehicle speed. Mechanical breakaway boom arms are included to protect crops, vines, and equipment during close-quarters operation. Mechanical breakaway boom arms are included to protect crops, vines, and equipment during close-quarters operation.Growers also have flexibility in how chemicals are managed, with options for direct tank mixing or inline dosing for more precise concentration control. All configurations connect to Yamaha Agriculture’s multi-vehicle remote (MVR) interface, which allows one or two operators to monitor and manage a fleet of Prospr vehicles simultaneously.Built to performYamaha Agriculture President and CEO Nolan Paul says the herbicide attachment reflects how the platform was designed from the outset. ‘Prospr was built to perform today and for the future. It is modular, AI-powered, and can accommodate attachments made by our partners for a range of tasks’, Growers have flexibility in how chemicals are managed, with options for direct tank mixing or inline dosing for more precise concentration control.Hybrid diesel-electric drivetrainThe Prospr platform runs on a hybrid diesel-electric drivetrain, offering up to 40 hours of runtime and claiming fuel consumption reductions of up to 70% compared to conventional alternatives. The vehicle is already deployed in orchard and vineyard operations across the United States, Australia and New Zealand.Yamaha Agriculture’s broader portfolio includes AI-powered yield prediction, integrated farm management systems, and autonomous fruit packing technology.LinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint René Groeneveld Correspondent for AustraliaMore aboutautonomous technologyherbicideshybrid drivetrainsrobotic harvestingweed controladLEARN MORERelated articles02-07 | NewsTersus GNSS AG993: Modular autosteer kit with built-in satellite correction fallbackPremium30-06 | Photo reportDLG Feldtage: hot, dusty and relatively quiet25-06 | NewsAgreenculture acquires Chouette to add agronomic intelligence to autonomous machines25-06 | NewsFieldwork Robotics secures new funding to accelerate raspberry harvesting robot Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
雅马哈农业为其Prospr自主混合动力车辆平台推出了除草剂喷洒附件，将该机器的能力扩展到果园和葡萄园的自动化杂草控制。

该附件是与Croplands Equipment合作开发的，设计嵌入Prospr现有的模块化架构中，使种植者能够在不产生大量停机时间的情况下切换工具。它于2026年在南澳大利亚的Hort Connections展会上首次公开亮相。

**自动喷嘴激活与药箱搅拌**
杂草管理长期以来一直是一项劳动密集型任务，且时间要求严格——延误会直接影响作物品质和产量。新附件旨在通过一个系统来应对这种压力，该系统可根据车速自动激活喷嘴、搅拌药箱、监测液位并实时调节喷雾速率。机械式防撞吊臂可在近距离作业时保护作物、藤蔓和设备。

种植者在化学品管理方面也具有灵活性，可选择直接药箱混合或在线计量注入，以实现更精确的浓度控制。所有配置均连接到雅马哈农业的多车远程界面，该界面允许一名或两名操作员同时监控和管理多台Prospr车辆。

**为性能而生**
雅马哈农业总裁兼首席执行官Nolan Paul表示，除草剂附件反映了该平台从一开始的设计理念。“Prospr是为当下和未来而打造的。它采用模块化设计，由人工智能驱动，并且可以容纳我们合作伙伴为各种任务制造的附件。”

种植者在化学品管理方面具有灵活性，可选择直接药箱混合或在线计量注入，以实现更精确的浓度控制。

**混合柴电动力系统**
Prospr平台采用混合柴电动力系统，续航时间长达40小时，据称与传统方案相比，燃油消耗可降低高达70%。该车辆已在美国、澳大利亚和新西兰的果园和葡萄园作业中部署。

雅马哈农业的 broader 产品组合包括人工智能驱动的产量预测、综合农场管理系统以及自主水果包装技术。
author: René Groeneveld
contentHtml: Yamaha Agriculture has introduced a herbicide spraying attachment for its Prospr autonomous hybrid vehicle platform, broadening the machine’s capabilities to include automated weed control in orchards and vineyards.
